zh.lifeSummary: 當Baudouin Ier le Vieux d'Ardres "de Marquise"於1105年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯時，他的父親Godefroy II D'ARDRES-DE SAINTE ALDEGONDE20歲，母親Alix DE BOULOGNE-DE MANDEVILLE16歲。他和Beatrice D'Alençon of Ponthieu Montgomery Bourgogne至少有2個兒子。他去世於1189年在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯馬爾吉享年84歲，埋葬在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯托特分泰。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Baudouin Ier le Vieux d'Ardres "de Marquise"于1105年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯时，他的父亲Godefroy II D'ARDRES-DE SAINTE ALDEGONDE20岁，母亲Alix DE BOULOGNE-DE MANDEVILLE16岁。他和Beatrice D'Alençon of Ponthieu Montgomery Bourgogne至少有2个儿子。他去世于1189年在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯馬爾吉享年84岁，埋葬在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯托特分泰。

nameMeanings.name: d'Ardres
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English:  See  Deards  .

variants.name: Deards
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ardres, a manor in Turvey (Beds), preceded by French de ‘of’.

nameMeanings.name: "de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Marquise"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Marquis  .

variants.name: Marquis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Normand, Marcel, Fernand, Lucien, Rosaire, Andre, Armand, Camille, Cecile, Jacques, Francois.

French: from the title marquis ‘marquess’, applied as an ironic nickname to someone who behaved like a marquis or as a metonymic occupational name for a servant in the household of a marquis. The title, derived from an ancient Germanic word meaning ‘boundary’ (compare March ), originally referred to the governor of a border territory. Marquises did not form part of the original French feudal structure of nobility; the title was first adopted by the Counts of Toulouse because of their possessions in the border region beyond the Rhône. Compare Markee and Markey .

English: nickname from Middle English markis ‘marquis, marquess, nobleman’ (Old French marchis); see also 1 above. The word is also found as a female personal name which may also be origin of the surname.

nameMeanings.name: Baudouin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Germanic. See Baldwin .

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Yiddish ber ‘bear’, probably influenced by the early medieval European practice of giving animal names to people. It is often paired with Dov in order to provide a Hebrew name in certain rituals.

nameMeanings.name: le
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: 1  ♂ ‘Profit’ or ‘sharp’.
2  ♀, ♂ ‘Upright’.

nameMeanings.name: Vieux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Edouard, Jacques, Pierre, Colette, Fernande, Georges, Germaine, Manon.
Altered form of French   Viau  .
French: from vieux ‘old’, probably applied as a nickname but also as a distinguishing epithet for the older of two bearers of the same personal name.

variants.name: Viau
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Pierre, Albertine, Andre, Armand, Edouard, Francois, Gaston, Gilles, Gisele, Jean Marie, Jean-Paul.
French: variant of   Vial  . Compare   Vieau  ,   Vieu  , and   Vieux  .

History: Jacques Viau dit Lespérance from Clisson in Loire-Atlantique, Brittany (France), married Madeleine Plouard in Montreal, QC, in 1670. Jean Viau from Ozillac in Charente-Maritime, France, married Françoise Prévost in Montreal, QC, in 1711.

en.lifeSummary: When Baudouin Ier le Vieux d'Ardres "de Marquise" was born in 1105, in Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Godefroy II D'ARDRES-DE SAINTE ALDEGONDE, was 20 and his mother, Alix DE BOULOGNE-DE MANDEVILLE, was 16. He had at least 2 sons with Beatrice D'Alençon of Ponthieu Montgomery Bourgogne. He died in 1189, in Marquise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 84, and was buried in Tortefontaine, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baudouin Ier le Vieux d'Ardres "de Marquise" est né en 1105, à Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Godefroy II D'ARDRES-DE SAINTE ALDEGONDE, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Alix DE BOULOGNE-DE MANDEVILLE, avait 16 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Beatrice D'Alençon of Ponthieu Montgomery Bourgogne. Il est décédé en 1189, à Marquise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterré à Tortefontaine, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Baudouin Ier le Vieux d'Ardres "de Marquise" 1105 in Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Godefroy II D'ARDRES-DE SAINTE ALDEGONDE 20 und seine Mutter Alix DE BOULOGNE-DE MANDEVILLE 16. Er hatte mit Beatrice D'Alençon of Ponthieu Montgomery Bourgogne mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1189 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Marquise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Tortefontaine, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Baudouin Ier le Vieux d'Ardres "de Marquise" è nato il nel 1105 nel Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Godefroy II D'ARDRES-DE SAINTE ALDEGONDE, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Alix DE BOULOGNE-DE MANDEVILLE, aveva 16 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Beatrice D'Alençon of Ponthieu Montgomery Bourgogne. Morì nel 1189, nel Marquise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 84 anni, e fu sepolto a Tortefontaine, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Baudouin Ier le Vieux d'Ardres "de Marquise"が1105年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスカレイスで生まれた時，父Godefroy II D'ARDRES-DE SAINTE ALDEGONDEは20歳，母Alix DE BOULOGNE-DE MANDEVILLEは16歳であった。彼はBeatrice D'Alençon of Ponthieu Montgomery Bourgogneとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1189年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスマルクイゼで84歳で死去し，フランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイストルテフォンティアインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Baudouin Ier le Vieux d'Ardres "de Marquise"(이)가 1105년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 캘레이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Godefroy II D'ARDRES-DE SAINTE ALDEGONDE(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Alix DE BOULOGNE-DE MANDEVILLE(은)는 16세였다. 그는 Beatrice D'Alençon of Ponthieu Montgomery Bourgogne(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1189년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 마키즈에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 토르테폰테인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baudouin Ier le Vieux d'Ardres "de Marquise" nasceu em 1105, em Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Godefroy II D'ARDRES-DE SAINTE ALDEGONDE, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Alix DE BOULOGNE-DE MANDEVILLE, tinha 16 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Beatrice D'Alençon of Ponthieu Montgomery Bourgogne. Ele faleceu em 1189, em Marquise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, com 84 anos, e foi sepultado em Tortefontaine, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baudouin Ier le Vieux d'Ardres "de Marquise" родился в 1105 г. в местности калеи, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Godefroy II D'ARDRES-DE SAINTE ALDEGONDE было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Alix DE BOULOGNE-DE MANDEVILLE, 16. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Beatrice D'Alençon of Ponthieu Montgomery Bourgogne. Он умер в 1189 г. в местности маркис, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 84 лет и был похоронен в местности тортефонтеин, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Baudouin Ier le Vieux d'Ardres "de Marquise" nació en 1105, en Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Godefroy II D'ARDRES-DE SAINTE ALDEGONDE, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Alix DE BOULOGNE-DE MANDEVILLE, tenía 16 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Beatrice D'Alençon of Ponthieu Montgomery Bourgogne. Murió en 1189, en Marquise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 84 años, y fue sepultado en Tortefontaine, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia.
